info.description: Complete, audited collection. Roles: doctor|client. All responses: {success, data} or {success, message}.
info.name: Therapy Booking - Full API (Audited)

request.description: Register a new client account. userType must be 'client' for clients.
Register a new doctor account. userType must be 'doctor'.
Login as a doctor. Automatically saves doctorToken and doctorId variables.
Login as a client. Automatically saves clientToken and clientId variables.
Login as an admin. Automatically saves adminToken. Seed admin first via seed_admin.sql.
Logout endpoint. Returns 200 OK. The client must discard the token on success. Use any valid token (clientToken, doctorToken, or adminToken).
Get current authenticated user info (userId, email, fullName, userType). Requires valid token.
Expects 400: userType must be one of client or doctor
Expects 400: password min 6 chars
Expects 401: Invalid credentials
Expects 400: Only whole-hour slots allowed
Expects 400: consultationDuration must be 30min|45min|60min
Expects 401: Unauthorized
Role: doctor. consultationDuration: 30min|45min|60min. Returns {success:true, data:{doctorId, profileStatus, profile:{primarySpecialty,...}}}
Role: doctor. Optional ?status=scheduled|completed|cancelled
Role: client. Profile setup accepts only gender, dateOfBirth, and phoneNumber. Returns {success:true, data:{clientId, profileStatus, profile:{gender,phoneNumber,dateOfBirth}}}
Role: client. Optional ?status=scheduled|completed|cancelled
Role: client. scheduledTime must be whole hour (HH:00). consultationType: video|audio|chat. Returns {success:true, data:{id,status,scheduledDate,scheduledTime,endTime,consultationType}}
Role: doctor or client. Returns appointments based on role.
Role: client. Only 'scheduled' appointments can be cancelled.
Role: doctor required to change status.
Role: doctor. Appointment must be 'scheduled'.
Role: doctor. Appointment must be 'in_progress'.
next_follow_up_date is the correct field (not follow_up_date).
Role: doctor or client. messageType: text only (MVP).

body.raw: {"recipient_id":"{{doctorId}}","message_body":"Hi, I would like to ask about my prescription.","subject":"Prescription Query"}

request.description: Standalone message. Fields: recipient_id (required), message_body or content, subject (optional).
Expects 400: userType must be one of client or doctor
Expects 400: password min 6 chars
Expects 401: Invalid credentials
Expects 400: Only whole-hour slots allowed
Expects 400: consultationDuration must be 30min|45min|60min
Expects 401: Unauthorized
